---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Qubixsa Quote Generator.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the Bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Page & Component Affected**
Specify which page is showing the issue:
- [ ] generator.html (Quote Generator)
- [ ] admin.html (Management Dashboard)
- [ ] portal.html (Customer Signature Portal)
- [ ] Database Schema / RPC API

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected Behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- Screen Size: [e.g. Mobile, Tablet, Desktop A4]
